The idea of this sneaky move is to setup a tactic that wins a tempo if black's not careful.
==Main Line - 6...Nbd7==

The best move and the refutation. Black develops the other knight and supports the other knight.

{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|=
|Sicilian Defence, Dragon Variation, Levenfish|

==The Trap - [[/6...Bg7|6...Bg7??]] 7. e5!==

If black goes for the normal dragon theme, they lose a tempo with. e5! as the move 6. f4, in fact prepared e5.
